subtitulo: Find the nearest meeting points and shelters.
hazClickEnElMapa: Click on the map to choose the location
sinPuntos: No safe points or shelters are available at this time.
confirmarUbicacionPregunta: Do you want to place a safe point here?
nombreNuevoPunto: Name of the new safe point
confirmarEliminarPunto: Are you sure you want to delete this safe point?
noSeEncontraronPuntos: No safe points or shelters were found.
errorCargarPuntosPropios: Your points could not be loaded. Showing suggested points.
errorCargarGoogleMaps: Could not load Google Maps. OpenStreetMap will be used instead.
geolocalizacionNoSoportada: Your browser does not allow getting your location. Google Maps will open with only the destination.
elegirComoLlegar: Choose how you want to get there from your current location.
errorGeolocalizacion: Could not access your location. Google Maps will open with only the destination.
iniciaSesionAgregarPunto: Log in to add your safe point.
selectUbicacionEnMapa: Select a location on the map.
completaNombreYReferencia: Fill in the name and safety reference.
errorGuardarPunto: Your safe point could not be saved.
errorEliminarPunto: The safe point could not be deleted.
